recommendations.title: Justice League: Doom
recommendations.overview: An adaptation of Mark Waid's "Tower of Babel" story from the JLA comic. Vandal Savage steals confidential files Batman has compiled on the members of the Justice League, and learns all their weaknesses.

recommendations.title: Green Lantern: First Flight
recommendations.genres: Action, Adventure, Fantasy, Animation, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Test pilot Hal Jordan finds himself recruited as the newest member of the intergalactic police force, The Green Lantern Corps.

recommendations.title: DC Showcase: Catwoman
recommendations.overview: Catwoman attempts to track down a mysterious cargo shipment that is linked to a Gotham City crime boss called Rough Cut.

recommendations.title: Justice League: Crisis on Two Earths
recommendations.genres: Action, Adventure, Animation, Science Fiction, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: A heroic version of Lex Luthor from an alternate universe appears to recruit the Justice League to help save his Earth from the Crime Syndicate, an evil version of the League. What ensues is the ultimate battle of good versus evil in a war that threa

recommendations.title: Superman: Doomsday
recommendations.overview: When LexCorp accidentally unleashes a murderous creature, Superman meets his greatest challenge as a champion. Based on the "The Death of Superman" storyline that appeared in DC Comics' publications in the 1990s.
recommendations.director: Lauren Montgomery, Bruce Timm, Brandon Vietti

recommendations.title: Batman: Year One
recommendations.overview: A wealthy playboy named Bruce Wayne and a Chicago cop named Jim Gordon both return to Gotham City where their lives unexpectedly intersect.

recommendations.title: Wonder Woman
recommendations.genres: Action, Adventure, Animation, Fantasy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: On the mystical island of Themyscira, a proud and fierce warrior race of Amazons have raised a daughter of untold beauty, grace and strength: Princess Diana. When an Army fighter pilot, Steve Trevor, crash-lands on the island, the rebellious and head

recommendations.title: Green Lantern: Emerald Knights
recommendations.genres: Action, Adventure, Animation, Science Fiction, Drama
recommendations.overview: As the home planet of the Green Lantern Corps faces a battle with an ancient enemy, Hal Jordan prepares new recruit Arisia for the coming conflict by relating stories of the first Green Lantern and several of Hal's comrades.
recommendations.director: Lauren Montgomery, Jay Oliva, Christopher Berkeley

recommendations.title: The Batman/Superman Movie: World's Finest
recommendations.genres: Action, Animation, TV Movie, Science Fiction, Family, Adventure
recommendations.overview: As the Joker visits Metropolis with a plan to kill Superman for Lex Luthor, Batman pursues the clown to Superman's turf.

recommendations.title: Nimona
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Adventure, Fantasy, Comedy, Action, Drama, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: A knight framed for a tragic crime teams with a scrappy, shape-shifting teen to prove his innocence.
